message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "should error when more damage entries are filed than items of that type in the policy"
Expected behavior: processScenario must throw when the damages array contains more entries of a given itemType than there are items of that type in the policy.
Current error: AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw an error
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

Make the minimal change so claims throw when damages.filter(d => d.itemType === T).length > policy.items.filter(i => i.type === T).length. Look at the existing assertDamagesAreValid / assertDamageIsCoveredByPolicy structure - the simple "policy contains the type" check is no longer sufficient; it needs to count.

content.text: I'll analyze the current implementation and make the minimal change to pass the failing test.

Now I'll make the minimal change. I need to modify `assertDamageIsCoveredByPolicy` (or the surrounding logic) to count items of each type. The simplest minimal change is to update `assertDamagesAreValid` to count damage entries per type and compare against the count of policy items per type.

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

content.text: Now let me run the tests to verify all pass.

content.text:
All 37 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- **Implementation**: Added `assertDamageCountsDoNotExceedPolicy` which counts damages per `itemType` and policy items per `type`, then throws when any damage count exceeds the matching policy item count. Called from `assertDamagesAreValid` after the existing per-damage checks.
- **Result**: All tests now pass (37 passing).
- **Approach**: This is the minimal addition needed because the existing `assertDamageIsCoveredByPolicy` only verifies that the type exists in the policy via `some()`, which cannot detect over-claiming. A counting check is the simplest way to satisfy the new test without altering existing behaviour for the other tests (each prior test files at most one damage per type matching exactly one policy item).

Relevant file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts`

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
